title: Imperator (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Imperator''''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Imperator]]'''— a [[Shah-tezh]] game piece.
*'''[[Imperator-class Star Destroyer|''Imperator''-class Star Destroyer]]'''— a model of [[Star Destroyer]] used by the [[Galactic Republic]].

==Legends==
*[[Imperator (CR90 corvette)|'''''Imperator''''']]— a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]].
*[[Imperator (Victory-class)|'''''Imperator''''']]— a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]].
*[[Imperator (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|'''''Imperator''''']]— [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]].
*[[Imperator (Imperial-class)|'''''Imperator''''']]— [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].
*[[Imperator (speeder bike)|'''Imperator''']]— [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]].
*'''''Imperator''-class Star Destroyer'''— the original name of the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]]
{{Disambig}}
